name: Motto by Hilton

current_snapshot.headquarters: 7930 Jones Branch Drive, Suite 1100, McLean, Virginia 22102

red_flags.summary: No Item 19 financial performance representation disclosed.

validation_questions: Confirm current auditor and most recent audit opinion.

internal_unresolveds.reason: Marketing fund (4% GRR Monthly Program Fee) is not separately audited or reported to franchisees
No FPR made despite 5 open hotels and $19M-$91M investment threshold
Early-stage brand risk — only 5 hotels after 6+ years of franchising, modest pipeline of 8
Hilton Franchise Holding LLC unconditionally guarantees Hilton parent debt maturing 2025-2033; all assets and franchise contracts pledged as collateral
Item 7 Note 22 states 'new brand' without actual investment data despite 5 operating hotels — likely outdated boilerplate
Note 9 subsequent events evaluation date 'March 18, 2024' appears to be typo for 2025
Gag clause restricts some current/former franchisees from discussing experience, limiting due diligence with only 5 open hotels
Item 7 Note 22 describes Motto as 'new brand' without actual investment data, but brand has been franchising since September 2018 with 5 open hotels
Note 9 states events evaluated through 'March 18, 2024' but FDD issuance date is March 30, 2025 and financials are for year ended December 31, 2024
